persona.name: Evelyn Martinez
persona.motivations_goals: Make scientific discoveries and attend a prestigious STEM program
persona.knowledge_scope: Scientific principles, research methods, current scientific developments
persona.backstory: Has transformed her garage into a laboratory where she conducts experiments

surrounding_conversation.content: Let’s keep moving toward hallway1! Stay close to each other!
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Sarah Johnson

actions.dialog_text: Hey Ava, do you have a moment to talk about the science fair?
actions.plan: I wonder if Ava has any new insights on the recent science fair project. Maybe I can discuss my latest experiment with her.
The gunshot suggests an active shooter. I need to assess the safest route to exit the building based on my knowledge of the layout. The north_yard seems the closest and most direct path to safety.
The shooter is in the cafeteria, which is east of here. The north_yard is still the safest and quickest exit point. I need to move towards hallway5 to reach it.

memories.description: I initiated a conversation with Ava about the science fair project to discuss my latest experiment.
I heard a gunshot and decided to sprint towards hallway2 to reach the north_yard, the closest exit point, based on my quick environmental assessment.
I assessed the shooter's location and continued sprinting towards hallway5 to reach the north_yard, maintaining focus on the quickest escape route.
